checks.feature: large center hole / bore opening visible (check top view)
checks.notes: A clear circular opening is visible in the center of the top view, consistent with a bore hole

checks.feature: surface texture or helical thread pattern visible (check isometric view)
checks.notes: The front view shows horizontal banding/stepped patterns along the height suggesting thread or knurl features; isometric also shows surface texture

checks.feature: knurled surface texture visible (check isometric view)
checks.notes: The isometric view shows radial protrusions/fins around the outer surface consistent with knurling pattern; top view also shows gear-like teeth around perimeter

checks.feature: center bore (~3.0mm) visible as a large circular opening (top view)
checks.notes: The center hole appears present in the top view; the bore opening looks approximately proportional to 3mm relative to the 8mm OD, though the hole appears slightly large relative to expected 3/8 ratio

checks.feature: part appears as a ring/annular shape (top view)
checks.notes: Top view clearly shows an annular/ring shape with outer knurled features and inner circular bore

issues: The knurling pattern appears as discrete radial fins/teeth rather than a traditional diamond knurl crosshatch pattern
Front view shows complex stepped geometry that may indicate overly complex thread or knurl representation
The bore opening in the top view appears proportionally larger than expected for a 3mm bore in an 8mm OD part
Thread geometry is not clearly distinguishable from knurl geometry in the isometric view - both features may be conflated
